name: Wuxi Commercial Mansion Grand Orient Co., Ltd.
summary: Wuxi Commercial Mansion Grand Orient Co., Ltd. primarily engages in the sale and service of automobiles in China. The company operates 46 car stores in Wuxi and surrounding cities. It also provides car repair and maintenance services, as well as supplies automotive products. In addition, the company operates department stores, supermarkets, and restaurants; sells cooked food products to approximately 20 large and medium-sized enterprises; and offers catering services. Wuxi Commercial Mansion Grand Orient Co., Ltd. is based in Wuxi, China.
